label.title: ClamAV Antivirus Settings
label.description: Configure the connection to the ClamAV antivirus daemon used to scan uploaded files for malware.
label.hostHint: Enter the hostname or IP address of the ClamAV daemon.
label.portHint: Enter a port number between 1 and 65535.
label.connectionTimeoutTooltip: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait when connecting to the ClamAV daemon. Default: 2000.
label.readTimeoutTooltip: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for the scan response. Increase for large files. Default: 20000.
label.saveError: An error occurred while saving the settings.
label.pingDescription: Test the connection to the ClamAV daemon using the configured host and port.
label.pingSuccess: Connection to the ClamAV daemon is successful.
label.pingError: Could not reach the ClamAV daemon. Check that the host and port are correct and that ClamAV is running.
label.scanDescription: Upload a file to test whether it would be accepted or rejected by the ClamAV daemon.
label.scanResultPassed: File passed the scan — no threats detected.
label.scanResultError: An error occurred while scanning the file.
label.scanResultConnectionFailed: Could not reach the ClamAV daemon to perform the scan.
label.scanResultSizeError: File exceeds the 10 MB size limit for test scans.
label.scanDaemonUnavailable: ClamAV daemon is not reachable. File scan is unavailable.
label.scanDisabledReason: File scan is unavailable because the ClamAV daemon is not reachable. Test the connection first.
